chosen_action.title: Start Here: Try Ralph Workflow on One Real Backlog Task

shared_findings_used: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: strongest next asset is a Start Here / first-task guide
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg primary adoption flat at 10 stars / 2 watchers / 2 forks with zero recent delta
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse competitor and positioning truths rather than inventing a new story
reddit_monitor_latest.md + reddit_post_analysis.md: no credible immediate Reddit move and repetition risk remains high
why_this_action.reasoning: The highest-leverage move available right now is a conversion asset closer to first use than another awareness post. Publishing a concrete first-task guide creates a reusable owned surface that tells evaluators exactly how to try Ralph Workflow on one real backlog item, while sending them to Codeberg first.

expected_outcome.primary_metric: more qualified first-run traffic to Codeberg
expected_outcome.secondary_metric: clearer evaluator path from interest to trial
expected_outcome.kill_condition: If this asset produces no visible reuse or no Codeberg movement after the next distribution pushes, replace it with a stronger proof asset or distribution wrapper.
